use_cases: Providing styled card containers with consistent shadow and border treatments
Creating modal and menu wrappers with predefined visual treatments
Building tooltip and small UI element containers
Adding depth and visual hierarchy to page sections
Consistent surface styling across UI components
ai_summary: A lightweight shadow and border utility component that provides multiple predefined container styles for creating consistent card-like surfaces, modal wrappers, menus, tooltips, and other UI containers. Features 8 style variants from subtle small shadows to large fullscreen containers.
